// GAME FUNCTIONS - Utility functions for Dunoon 2056 // Transitions, time tracking, skill checks, and other mechanics // ==================== TRANSITION FUNCTIONS ==================== transition_instant newScreen: set_screen $newScreen play sound static_burst transition newScreen: set_screen clear 1 set data.transition.sprite (create_sprite img/backgrounds/transition.png 722.5 540) set data.transition.sprite.anchor.x 0.5 set data.transition.sprite.anchor.y 0.5 set data.transition.sprite.layer 1 set data.transition.sprite.cssClass "slide-down slide-down-appear" play sound static_burst wait 10 set data.transition.sprite.cssClass "slide-down" wait 1985 set_screen $newScreen set data.transition.sprite.cssClass "slide-down slide-down-leave" wait 1985 delete_sprite $data.transition.sprite empty_layer 1 transition_black newScreen: set_screen clear 1 set_screen generic_black 1 fade 2000 set_screen $newScreen if (== $newScreen "game_map"): run game_map_loadButtons if (== $newScreen "home_shack"): run home_shack_loadButtons wait 500 set_screen clear 1 fade 2000 empty_layer 1 transition_glitch newScreen: set_screen clear 1 animate #narrat-app narrat-glitch play sound glitch_heavy set_screen $newScreen empty_layer 1 // ==================== TIME MANAGEMENT ==================== // Spend hours on actions spend_hours amount: subtract data.time.hoursRemaining $amount add data.time.totalActions 1 run check_time_warning if (<= $data.time.hoursRemaining 0): jump game_over // Check if player should be warned about time check_time_warning: if (== $data.time.hoursRemaining 25): talk survivor internal "25 hours left. We're running out of time." elseif (== $data.time.hoursRemaining 10): talk hacker internal "10 hours. The implant is failing faster. We need to finish this." elseif (== $data.time.hoursRemaining 5): talk ancestor internal "Five hours. Whatever we're going to do, we must do it now." elseif (<= $data.time.hoursRemaining 1): "The world is getting dark. Your vision flickers. Time is almost up." // Display current time remaining display_time: "TIME REMAINING: $data.time.hoursRemaining HOURS" // ==================== SKILL CHECK HELPERS ==================== // Hacker skill check with flavor text hacker_check difficulty: if (roll hacker_check hacker $difficulty): return true else: return false // Survivor skill check with flavor text survivor_check difficulty: if (roll survivor_check survivor $difficulty): return true else: return false // Ancestor skill check with flavor text ancestor_check difficulty: if (roll ancestor_check ancestor $difficulty): return true else: return false // ==================== WORLD STATE ==================== update_weather: // Random weather changes set data.world.weather (random "clear" "hot" "windy" "dusty" "rain") get_time_of_day: if (>= $data.time.hoursRemaining 75): set data.world.timeOfDay "morning" elseif (>= $data.time.hoursRemaining 50): set data.world.timeOfDay "afternoon" elseif (>= $data.time.hoursRemaining 25): set data.world.timeOfDay "evening" else: set data.world.timeOfDay "night" // ==================== IMPLANT MECHANICS ==================== check_implant_status: if (>= $data.time.hoursRemaining 75): talk hacker internal "Implant status: Damaged but stable. We have time." elseif (>= $data.time.hoursRemaining 50): talk hacker internal "Implant status: Degradation accelerating. We need to find answers soon." elseif (>= $data.time.hoursRemaining 25): talk hacker internal "Implant status: Critical. Memory retrieval becoming difficult." else: talk hacker internal "Implant status: Terminal. We're living on borrowed time." // Attempt to recover a memory (costs hours) recover_memory: run spend_hours 5 set data.player.memoriesRecovered (+ $data.player.memoriesRecovered 1) "You dive into your fractured consciousness, searching for fragments of yourself..." clear_dialog if (roll memory_recovery ancestor 40): "A memory surfaces, sharp and clear for a moment before fading..." return true else: "Nothing. Static. The corruption is too deep." return false // ==================== RELATIONSHIP TRACKING ==================== modify_relationship character amount: if (== $character "mamaNomi"): add data.relationships.mamaNomi $amount elseif (== $character "tango"): add data.relationships.tango $amount elseif (== $character "silas"): add data.relationships.silas $amount elseif (== $character "netrunnerCollective"): add data.relationships.netrunnerCollective $amount check_relationship character: if (== $character "mamaNomi"): return $data.relationships.mamaNomi elseif (== $character "tango"): return $data.relationships.tango elseif (== $character "silas"): return $data.relationships.silas elseif (== $character "netrunnerCollective"): return $data.relationships.netrunnerCollective // ==================== HACKING MECHANICS ==================== // Basic hack attempt attempt_hack difficulty: run spend_hours 2 "You close your eyes and reach into the Net..." clear_dialog if (roll hack_attempt hacker $difficulty): play sound hack_success talk hacker internal "Got it. The code flows like water." return true else: play sound hack_fail talk hacker internal "Damn. Security's tighter than I thought." return false // Deep dive (more hours, higher difficulty possible) deep_dive difficulty: run spend_hours 5 "You plunge deep into the virtual architecture, risking everything..." clear_dialog animate #narrat-app narrat-glitch play sound deep_dive if (roll deep_dive_attempt hacker $difficulty): play sound hack_success "The data opens before you like a flower." return true else: play sound hack_fail "ICE tears at your consciousness. You barely escape with your mind intact." run spend_hours 3 return false // ==================== COMBAT/SURVIVAL ==================== // Street smart check for danger detect_danger: if (roll danger_detection survivor 30): talk survivor internal "Something's wrong. Watch your back." return true else: return false // Attempt to flee flee_attempt: if (roll flee_roll survivor 40): "You melt into the shadows, another ghost in the township." return true else: "There's nowhere to run. You'll have to face this." return false // ==================== DIALOGUE HELPERS ==================== // Show all three voices reacting to something all_voices_react: talk hacker internal "Interesting. It always is." talk ancestor internal "Technology is a tool. People are the answer." elseif (&& (== $voiceOne "survivor") (== $voiceTwo "ancestor")): talk survivor internal "Trust no one. Everyone has an angle." talk ancestor internal "Trust is how we survive. Not alone, but together." // ==================== BUTTON MANAGEMENT ==================== hide_all_buttons: set_button button_home_shack hidden set_button button_mama_nomi hidden set_button button_tango hidden set_button button_silas hidden set_button button_net_cafe hidden set_button button_market hidden set_button button_clinic hidden set_button button_abandoned_lot hidden set_button button_wine_farm hidden set_button button_beach hidden show_button buttonName: set_button $buttonName true grey_button buttonName: set_button $buttonName greyed // ==================== MISC UTILITIES ==================== skip: set doesNothing true save_prompt: "[Game saved automatically]" hours_display: "[$data.time.hoursRemaining HOURS REMAINING]"

// GAME MAP - Dunoon Township and Surroundings // Location system with time-based events and quest triggers game_map: clear_dialog run display_time run get_time_of_day if (!= $data.time.hoursRemaining 0): play music dunoon_ambient else: stop music if (!= $data.game_map.inMap true): set data.game_map.inMap true run hide_all_buttons run transition_black game_map_screen run game_map_loadButtons run game_prompts game_map_loadButtons: // HOME SHACK - Always available if (!= $data.game_map.inPrompts true): set_button button_home_shack true // MAMA NOMI'S PLACE - Available after intro if (&& $data.player.knowsIdentity (!= $data.game_map.inPrompts true)): set_button button_mama_nomi true // TANGO'S REPAIR SHOP - Available after meeting Mama Nomi if (&& (>= $data.relationships.mamaNomi 1) (!= $data.game_map.inPrompts true)): set_button button_tango true // SILAS AT THE ABANDONED LOT - Available after learning about past if (&& $data.quests.knowAboutSilas (!= $data.game_map.inPrompts true)): set_button button_abandoned_lot true // NET CAFE - Available after intro if (&& $data.player.knowsIdentity (!= $data.game_map.inPrompts true)): set_button button_net_cafe true // MARKET - Available during certain hours if (&& (>= $data.time.hoursRemaining 30) (!= $data.game_map.inPrompts true)): set_button button_market true // CLINIC - Available after learning about implant if (&& $data.quests.knowAboutImplant (!= $data.game_map.inPrompts true)): set_button button_clinic true // WINE FARM - Available after certain story progress if (&& (>= $data.player.memoriesRecovered 2) (!= $data.game_map.inPrompts true)): set_button button_wine_farm true // BEACH - Available in final hours if (&& (<= $data.time.hoursRemaining 25) (!= $data.game_map.inPrompts true)): set_button button_beach true game_prompts: // Main story prompts if (objective_started? main_story find_mama_nomi): if (!= $data.game_map.inPrompts true): "[Find Mama Nomi's place - she might know who you are]" if (objective_started? main_story fix_implant): if (!= $data.game_map.inPrompts true): "[Find someone who can help with your damaged implant]" if (objective_started? main_story recover_memories): if (!= $data.game_map.inPrompts true): "[Recover more memories before time runs out]" // Time warnings if (<= $data.time.hoursRemaining 25): if (!= $data.game_map.inPrompts true): "[WARNING: Time is running out]" // ==================== LOCATION: HOME SHACK ==================== location_home_shack: run transition shack_interior set data.game_map.inMap false set data.game_map.currentLocation "home" clear_dialog "Your shack. Small, cramped, but it's shelter. Home, for now." clear_dialog jump home_shack_menu home_shack_menu: clear_dialog choice: "What do you do?" "[Rest] - Rest for a few hours (costs 3 hours)" if (>= $data.time.hoursRemaining 5): run spend_hours 3 "You close your eyes and let exhaustion take you. Dreamless. Brief. Necessary." clear_dialog if (roll rest_recovery survivor 30): talk survivor internal "Better. Not fully rested, but better." jump home_shack_menu "[Check your neural deck]" if (has_item? neural_deck): jump home_shack_deck "[Examine the photograph on the wall]" if (!= $data.home.examinedPhoto true): set data.home.examinedPhoto true "You pick up the faded photograph. The woman stares back at you—kind eyes, weathered face, the bright patterns of West African cloth." clear_dialog if (roll photo_memory ancestor 40): "A memory surfaces: this woman, younger, holding your hand. Walking through a market. Teaching you words in a language you've forgotten." talk ancestor internal "Your mother. Or someone who was like a mother. She is why you are still alive." add_level ancestor 1 else: "Nothing. Her face means nothing to you. But you keep looking anyway." jump home_shack_menu "[Search for useful items]" if (!= $data.home.searched true): set data.home.searched true jump home_shack_search "[Try to access the implant directly]" if (&& (>= $data.skills.hacker 2) (!= $data.home.implantAttempt true)): set data.home.implantAttempt true jump home_shack_implant "[Leave] [[BACK TO MAP]]": jump game_map home_shack_deck: clear_dialog "The neural deck is old but functional. A hacker's lifeline. Your lifeline." clear_dialog choice: "What do you do with it?" "[Run diagnostics on your implant]" if (!= $data.home.deckDiag true): set data.home.deckDiag true run spend_hours 1 "You jack in. The connection is rough—static, noise, fragments of corrupted data." clear_dialog talk hacker internal "The diagnostic confirms what we feared. The implant's memory banks are degrading. We have maybe 100 hours before total cascade failure." talk hacker internal "But there's something else... a hidden partition. Encrypted. Someone wanted to hide something in our head." start_objective main_story hidden_partition "[Browse the local Net]" if (!= $data.home.browsedNet true): set data.home.browsedNet true run spend_hours 1 "You skim through the local mesh. News, gossip, advertisements for things you can't afford." clear_dialog "A headline catches your eye: "MYSTERIOUS DEATHS IN WINE COUNTRY - AUTHORITIES INVESTIGATE"" talk survivor internal "Wine country. The farms. That's close to Dunoon. Could be connected to us." "[Practice hacking techniques]": run spend_hours 2 if (roll deck_practice hacker 40): "You run through old exercises, muscle memory guiding your fingers. You're better than you thought." add_level hacker 1 else: "The practice is frustrating. Your mind isn't what it was. But you keep trying." "[Put the deck away]": jump home_shack_menu jump home_shack_menu home_shack_search: clear_dialog "You dig through the shack's meager contents." clear_dialog if (roll home_search survivor 40): "Hidden under the floorboards, a small cache: a credchip with a few credits, a shiv wrapped in cloth, and a data chip." add_item credchip 1 set data.inventory.credits 15 add_item shiv 1 add_item data_chip 1 talk survivor internal "Someone—we—were hiding things. Preparing for something. This isn't just a home. It's a safehouse." else: "You find nothing useful. Either there was nothing to find, or someone got here first." jump home_shack_menu home_shack_implant: clear_dialog run spend_hours 3 "You close your eyes and reach inward, trying to access the implant's architecture directly." clear_dialog "It's like trying to read a book while someone sets it on fire." clear_dialog if (roll direct_access hacker 50): "For a moment, you break through. Images flash: a laboratory. People in white coats. A woman with your mother's face. A man with a gun. Then nothing." set data.player.memoriesRecovered (+ $data.player.memoriesRecovered 1) talk hacker internal "We got something. Not much, but it's a start. The implant has layers. We need to peel them back carefully." else: "The implant rejects you. Pain lances through your skull. You see only static." run spend_hours 1 talk survivor internal "Don't do that again. It's killing us faster." jump home_shack_menu // ==================== LOCATION: MAMA NOMI'S PLACE ==================== location_mama_nomi: run transition mama_nomi_exterior set data.game_map.inMap false set data.game_map.currentLocation "mama_nomi" clear_dialog "Mama Nomi's Place. The sign is hand-painted, faded, but the smell of cooking food drifts through the door." clear_dialog if (!= $data.mamaNomi.met true): jump mama_nomi_first_meeting else: jump mama_nomi_menu mama_nomi_first_meeting: set data.mamaNomi.met true complete_objective main_story find_mama_nomi "You push through the door. Inside, it's dim and warm. A long counter. A few plastic tables. Cables running along the ceiling to a bank of old terminals in the corner." clear_dialog "Behind the counter, a large woman looks up at you. Her face creases into a smile—or maybe a grimace. Hard to tell." clear_dialog talk mama_nomi talk "Ah. You're awake. Good. I was starting to worry." clear_dialog "She knows you." clear_dialog choice: "She knows you." "You know me? Who am I?": jump mama_nomi_explanation "What happened to me?": jump mama_nomi_explanation mama_nomi_explanation: talk mama_nomi talk "Sit down. Eat first. You look like death warmed over." "She sets a plate of pap and stew in front of you. The first real food you can remember tasting." clear_dialog talk mama_nomi talk "You came to me three days ago. Stumbling. Bleeding from your eyes and nose. Said someone did something to your implant." clear_dialog talk mama_nomi talk "I did what I could. Patched you up. But I'm not a tech. You need someone who understands neural architecture." clear_dialog talk mama_nomi talk "Your name... you told me your name is Kundai. Or maybe that's what you call yourself now." clear_dialog "Kundai. The name feels right. Or at least, it feels like a name you've worn for a while." clear_dialog set data.player.name "Kundai" talk mama_nomi talk "As for who you really are... that's your story to remember. I can only tell you what I saw." clear_dialog run modify_relationship "mamaNomi" 2 start_objective main_story fix_implant jump mama_nomi_menu mama_nomi_menu: clear_dialog choice: "What do you do?" "[Order food] - Cost: 2 hours, restores energy": run spend_hours 2 "You eat. The food is simple but filling. For a moment, you feel almost normal." if (roll food_heal survivor 50): "Your headache eases slightly." "[Talk to Mama Nomi]" if (!= $data.mamaNomi.talked true): set data.mamaNomi.talked true jump mama_nomi_talk "[Use the network terminals] - Cost: 1 hour" if (!= $data.mamaNomi.usedTerminal true): set data.mamaNomi.usedTerminal true run spend_hours 1 "The terminals are old but functional. You search for information about yourself, about neural implants, about anything that might help." clear_dialog if (roll terminal_search hacker 40): "You find a forum post: "Has anyone heard of black-site neural experiments in the Cape Town area? My cousin went missing after taking a tech job in the wine country." talk hacker internal "Wine country again. There's something there. Something they don't want found." "[Ask about Tango]" if (&& (>= $data.relationships.mamaNomi 1) (!= $data.mamaNomi.askedAboutTango true)): set data.mamaNomi.askedAboutTango true talk mama_nomi talk "Tango? He's a fixer. A repairman. Works out of a shack near the market. If anyone can look at that implant, it's him." talk mama_nomi talk "But he's... particular. Doesn't like strangers. You'll need to convince him you're worth his time." set data.quests.knowAboutTango true "[Leave] [[BACK TO MAP]]": jump game_map jump mama_nomi_menu mama_nomi_talk: clear_dialog talk mama_nomi talk "You want to know more? About yourself? About Dunoon?" clear_dialog choice: "What do you ask about?" "Tell me about Dunoon.": talk mama_nomi talk "Dunoon is what happens when people are forgotten. // HOME SHACK - Player's home location // Detailed interactions, memories, and personal discovery home_shack_entry: run transition shack_interior set data.game_map.inMap false set data.game_map.currentLocation "home" // Ambient description based on time if (>= $data.time.hoursRemaining 75): "Morning light filters through the cracks in your shack's walls. The air is cool, almost pleasant." elseif (>= $data.time.hoursRemaining 50): "The afternoon heat is building. Your shack is stifling." elseif (>= $data.time.hoursRemaining 25): "Evening shadows stretch across your shack. The light is golden, almost beautiful." else: "Night has fallen. Your shack is dark, lit only by the faint glow of your dying implant." clear_dialog jump home_shack_main home_shack_main: clear_dialog run hours_display clear_dialog choice: "Your shack. Your refuge. What do you do?" // REST OPTIONS "[Rest] - Sleep for a few hours (Cost: 3 hours)" if (>= $data.time.hoursRemaining 5): run spend_hours 3 jump home_shack_rest "[Deep rest] - Sleep through the night (Cost: 8 hours)" if (>= $data.time.hoursRemaining 12): run spend_hours 8 jump home_shack_deep_rest // MEMORY RECOVERY "[Meditate] - Try to recover memories (Cost: 5 hours)" if (>= $data.time.hoursRemaining 8): run spend_hours 5 jump home_shack_meditate // INVENTORY/ITEMS "[Check your belongings]": jump home_shack_inventory "[Examine the neural deck]" if (has_item? neural_deck): jump home_shack_deck "[Look at the photograph]" if (!= $data.home.examinedPhoto true): jump home_shack_photo // ENVIRONMENT "[Search the shack thoroughly]" if (!= $data.home.thoroughlySearched true): jump home_shack_thorough_search "[Check the hidden compartment]" if (&& $data.home.foundCompartment (!= $data.home.checkedCompartment true)): jump home_shack_compartment // IMPLANT INTERACTION "[Focus on your implant]" if (>= $data.skills.hacker 2): jump home_shack_implant_focus // VOICE CONVERSATIONS "[Talk to the voices in your head]" if (!= $data.home.talkedToVoices true): jump home_shack_voices "[Leave] [[BACK TO MAP]]": jump game_map // ==================== REST SEQUENCES ==================== home_shack_rest: clear_dialog "You lie down on the thin mattress. Your body aches. Your mind races. But exhaustion wins." clear_dialog play sound sleep wait 2000 "..." clear_dialog "You dream of falling. Of code scrolling endlessly. Of a woman's voice calling your name." clear_dialog "You wake with a start. The dream fades, but the feeling remains." clear_dialog if (roll rest_dream ancestor 30): talk ancestor internal "Dreams are messages from the deeper self. Remember the falling. Remember the code. They mean something." set data.player.dreamsHad (+ $data.player.dreamsRecovered 1) jump home_shack_main home_shack_deep_rest: clear_dialog "You need proper sleep. Real rest. You settle in for the night." clear_dialog play sound sleep wait 3000 "The darkness takes you." clear_dialog "..." clear_dialog // Deeper dream sequence "You stand in a room of white. Sterile. Clinical. People in lab coats move around you." clear_dialog "One of them turns. You see your own face, but older. Scarred." clear_dialog "\"You did this to yourself,\" the face says. \"Remember that.\"" clear_dialog "You wake gasping. The shack is dark. Your implant throbs." clear_dialog set data.player.memoriesRecovered (+ $data.player.memoriesRecovered 1) talk hacker internal "A laboratory. Experiments. And someone who looks like us. This is important." talk survivor internal "This is dangerous. Someone's been in our head. Literally." jump home_shack_main // ==================== MEDITATION/MEMORY ==================== home_shack_meditate: clear_dialog "You sit in the center of the shack, close your eyes, and turn inward." clear_dialog "The implant's damaged architecture looms in your mind's eye—a labyrinth of corrupted data and locked memories." clear_dialog if (roll memory_meditation ancestor 40): "You find a crack in the walls. A fragment of memory..." clear_dialog // Random memory fragment set data.meditation.memoryType (random 1 3) if (== $data.meditation.memoryType 1): "You see a young man's face. Dark skin, bright eyes, a smile that makes your heart ache. He says something you can't hear. Then he's gone." talk ancestor internal "Love. You loved someone. Remember that feeling. It will guide you back to yourself." set data.home.rememberedLove true elseif (== $data.meditation.memoryType 2): "You see lines of code. Elegant. Beautiful. Your fingers moving across a keyboard, building something important. A message? A weapon? You can't tell." talk hacker internal "We created something. Something powerful. We need to find out what." set data.home.rememberedCreation true else: "You see a building. Glass and steel rising above the township. A corporate logo you almost recognize. You're running toward it. Or away from it." talk survivor internal "The corps. The enemy. We were fighting them. We need to find out why." set data.home.rememberedEnemy true set data.player.memoriesRecovered (+ $data.player.memoriesRecovered 1) else: "The walls are too thick. The corruption too deep. You surface with nothing but a headache." talk survivor internal "Don't push too hard. You'll burn out what's left of your mind." jump home_shack_main // ==================== INVENTORY ==================== home_shack_inventory: clear_dialog "You take stock of what you have:" clear_dialog if (has_item? neural_deck): "- A neural deck (essential for hacking)" if (has_item? credchip): "- A credchip with $data.inventory.credits credits" if (has_item? shiv): "- A shiv (better than nothing in a fight)" if (has_item? data_chip): "- A mysterious data chip (contents unknown)" if (has_item? ice_breaker): "- ICE Breaker software (hacking bonus)" if (has_item? stims): "- Stim patches (emergency healing)" if (&& (!= (has_item? neural_deck) true) (!= $data.home.deckFound true)): "You notice something under the mattress..." choice: "[Investigate]": jump home_shack_find_deck "[Ignore it for now]": jump home_shack_main jump home_shack_main home_shack_find_deck: set data.home.deckFound true add_item neural_deck 1 "You pull out a battered neural deck. Nigerian, maybe, or Ghanaian. The bright patterns contrast with the gray walls of your shack." clear_dialog "On the back, someone has written in faded ink: "My Amina. The smell of her perfume." talk ancestor internal "Your mother. Or the woman who raised you. Her love is still with you, even if she isn't." add_level ancestor 1 set data.home.knowMother true else: "You feel the shape of the love, but not its substance. Like a book you once read but can't remember." "[Loss] - She's gone. Someone took her from you.": if (roll photo_loss survivor 50): "A flash of grief so sharp it doubles you over. A funeral. A coffin. A face you hate but can't place." talk survivor internal "Someone hurt her. Someone hurt you. We need to find out who. Make them pay." set data.home.knowLoss true else: "The loss is there, but its source is hidden. Locked away with everything else." "[Nothing] - The photograph means nothing to you.": talk hacker internal "The connection is there. The data is just corrupted. We need more time." jump home_shack_main // ==================== THOROUGH SEARCH ==================== home_shack_thorough_search: set data.home.thoroughlySearched true clear_dialog run spend_hours 1 "You tear the shack apart, looking for anything that might tell you who you are." clear_dialog // Hidden compartment discovery if (roll search_hidden survivor 40): "Your fingers find a loose floorboard. Underneath, a hidden compartment." set data.home.foundCompartment true talk survivor internal "Smart. We were hiding things. Preparing for something." // Random discoveries if (roll search_items survivor 50): "In a crack in the wall, you find a credchip with 25 credits." add data.inventory.credits 25 if (roll search_notes hacker 40): "Scrawled on a scrap of paper, barely legible: "SILAS KNOWS. FIND HIM."" set data.quests.knowAboutSilas true talk hacker internal "Silas. Someone who has answers. We need to find him." if (roll search_map survivor 30): "A hand-drawn map of the wine farms, with one building circled in red." add_item wine_farm_map 1 talk survivor internal "Something happened at those farms. Something important enough to map out." "You've searched thoroughly. There's nothing else to find." jump home_shack_main // ==================== HIDDEN COMPARTMENT ==================== home_shack_compartment: set data.home.checkedCompartment true clear_dialog "You lift the floorboard and reveal a small cache hidden beneath." clear_dialog // Contents based on what's been discovered "Inside you find:" clear_dialog "- A credchip with 50 credits" add data.inventory.credits 50 "- A shiv, sharp and well-maintained" add_item shiv 1 "- A data chip, label worn away" add_item data_chip 1 "- A photograph, different from the one on the wall" add_item secret_photo 1 "The photograph shows you—you recognize your own face—standing with three other people. A young woman with cybernetic arms. An older man with graying hair. A teenager with a nervous smile." clear_dialog "On the back: "The Collective. We fight together."" clear_dialog talk hacker internal "The Netrunner Collective. These were our people. Our team. We need to find them." talk survivor internal "If they're still alive. If they haven't been captured or killed." talk ancestor internal "Family isn't always blood. These people chose to fight alongside us. Remember that." set data.quests.foundCollectivePhoto true jump home_shack_main // ==================== IMPLANT FOCUS ==================== home_shack_implant_focus: clear_dialog "You close your eyes and sink into the architecture of your own mind." clear_dialog "The implant is a city of corrupted data—buildings crumbling, streets blocked, files scattered like debris after a storm." clear_dialog choice: "Where do you focus?" "[The core] - Try to access the central memory banks": run spend_hours 2 if (roll implant_core hacker 50): "You push through the corruption and find a single intact file. A video." clear_dialog "You see yourself, speaking to a camera. Younger. Unafraid." clear_dialog "\"If you're watching this, I'm dead or worse. The project is real. The experiments are happening. The Collective has the evidence. Find them. Finish what we started.\"" clear_dialog set data.player.memoriesRecovered (+ $data.player.memoriesRecovered 1) set data.quests.knowAboutProject true talk hacker internal "A project. Experiments. We were trying to expose something. That's why they did this to us." else: "The core is too damaged. Every time you get close, the corruption pushes you back." run spend_hours 1 talk survivor internal "We're not ready. We need more skills, more knowledge. Come back when we're stronger." "[The edges] - Look for fragments in the peripheral systems": run spend_hours 1 if (roll implant_edges hacker 40): "You find scattered fragments—a name here, a date there, coordinates that might mean something." set data.player.memoriesRecovered (+ $data.player.memoriesRecovered 1) talk hacker internal "Useful data. We're piecing together a picture. Slowly." else: "The edges are worse than the core—nothing but static and noise." "[The hidden partition] - Try to crack the encrypted section" if $data.home.deckDiag: run spend_hours 3 if (roll implant_hidden hacker 60): "The encryption is military-grade, but you've seen it before. In another life. Your fingers know the patterns." clear_dialog "The partition opens. Inside: names, dates, locations. A list of people who were experimented on. You're on the list." clear_dialog "At the bottom: "PROJECT LAZARUS - PHASE 2 COMMENCING - CAPE TOWN SECTOR"" clear_dialog set data.player.memoriesRecovered (+ $data.player.memoriesRecovered 2) set data.quests.knowAboutLazarus true talk hacker internal "Project Lazarus. That's what they called it. We were part of it. Or fighting against it." else: "The encryption is too strong. You'd need better equipment, or more time you don't have." "[Retreat] - This is too dangerous right now": "You pull back. The implant settles, but the sense of untapped knowledge remains." jump home_shack_main // ==================== VOICE CONVERSATIONS ==================== home_shack_voices: set data.home.talkedToVoices true clear_dialog "You sit in silence and address the presences in your mind." clear_dialog choice: "Who do you want to speak to?" "[The Hacker] - Ask about your technical skills": clear_dialog talk hacker internal "You want to know what I know? Fine." talk hacker internal "I know code. I know the Net. I know how to break into systems and extract information." talk hacker internal "I don't know who taught us, or why. But I know we're good. Very good. Good enough to scare someone." talk hacker internal "Whatever happened to us, we were a threat. That's why they scrambled our brain." add_level hacker 1 "[The Survivor] - Ask about your instincts": clear_dialog talk survivor internal "You want to know what I know? Here it is." talk survivor internal "I know how to read people. How to spot a threat. How to disappear when needed." talk survivor internal "I know hunger. Cold. Fear. I know how to keep going when everything tells you to stop." talk survivor internal "Whatever happened to us, we've been through worse. We can handle this." add_level survivor 1 "[The Ancestor] - Ask about your wisdom": clear_dialog talk ancestor internal "You want to know what I carry? Listen." talk ancestor internal "I carry the voices of those who came before. The ones who survived slavery. Apartheid. Poverty." talk ancestor internal "I carry their strength, their faith, their knowledge that survival is a collective act." talk ancestor internal "Whatever happened to us, we are not alone. We have never been alone." add_level ancestor 1 "[All three] - Ask them to work together": clear_dialog talk hacker internal "We've been fighting each other since you woke up. That needs to stop." talk survivor internal "Agreed. We're stronger together. Each of us sees something the others miss." talk ancestor internal "Then let us make peace. We are not three voices. We are one mind, fragmented. Time to become whole." "You feel a shift in your consciousness. The voices don't disappear, but they harmonize. Working together instead of arguing." add_level hacker 1 add_level survivor 1 add_level ancestor 1 set data.home.voicesHarmonized true jump home_shack_main // ==================== NEURAL DECK ==================== home_shack_deck: clear_dialog "You pick up the neural deck. It's old but reliable. Your fingers find the controls without thinking." clear_dialog choice: "What do you do with it?" "[Run diagnostics on your implant]": run spend_hours 1 "You jack in. The connection is rough—static, noise, fragments of corrupted data." clear_dialog if (!= $data.home.deckDiag true): set data.home.deckDiag true talk hacker internal "Diagnostic complete. The implant's memory banks are degrading. We have about $data.time.hoursRemaining hours before total failure." talk hacker internal "But there's something else... a hidden partition. Encrypted. Someone wanted to hide something in our head." start_objective main_story hidden_partition else: talk hacker internal "Nothing new. The degradation continues. We need to find answers before it's too late." "[Access the local Net]": run spend_hours 1 "You connect to the local mesh. It's limited—the township doesn't have great infrastructure—but it's something." clear_dialog // Random news/events set data.deck.netEvent (random 1 4) if (== $data.deck.netEvent 1): "A headline catches your eye: "MYSTERIOUS DEATHS IN WINE COUNTRY - AUTHORITIES INVESTIGATE"" talk survivor internal "Wine country. The farms. That's close to Dunoon. Could be connected to us." elseif (== $data.deck.netEvent 2): "A forum post: "Anyone else seen increased corp security in Dunoon? They're looking for someone."" talk survivor internal "They're looking for us. We need to be careful." elseif (== $data.deck.netEvent 3): "A help wanted ad: "NETRUNNERS WANTED - HIGH RISK, HIGH PAY - CONTACT SILAS AT THE ABANDONED LOT"" talk hacker internal "Silas again. This person keeps coming up. We need to find them." set data.quests.knowAboutSilas true else: "Nothing useful. Just the usual noise of people trying to survive." "[Practice hacking]": run spend_hours 2 "You run through old exercises, muscle memory guiding your fingers." clear_dialog if (roll deck_practice hacker 40): "You're better than you thought. The skills are still there, buried under the damage." add_level hacker 1 else: "The practice is frustrating. Your mind isn't what it was. But you keep trying." "[Examine the data chip]" if (has_item? data_chip): run spend_hours 1 "You slot the data chip into the deck." clear_dialog if (roll chip_decode hacker 50): "The data is encrypted, but you crack it. Inside: a list of names, dates, and medical codes." clear_dialog "Your name is on the list. So are twenty others." clear_dialog talk hacker internal "More victims of whatever was done to us. If we can find them, we might find answers." set data.quests.foundVictimList true else: "The encryption is too complex. You'd need better software or more time." "[Put the deck away]": jump home_shack_main jump home_shack_main

// DUNOON TOWNSHIP - Outside exploration // Additional locations, NPCs, and side quests // ==================== MARKET ==================== location_market: run transition market_day set data.game_map.inMap false set data.game_map.currentLocation "market" clear_dialog "Dunoon Market. A chaotic sprawl of stalls, blankets, and improvised shops." clear_dialog "Here you can buy almost anything—if you have the credits." clear_dialog jump market_main market_main: clear_dialog run hours_display clear_dialog choice: "The market buzzes with activity. What do you do?" "[Browse the stalls]": jump market_browse "[Look for information]" if (!= $data.market.lookedForInfo true): set data.market.lookedForInfo true run spend_hours 1 jump market_info "[Find a fence]" if (&& (>= $data.skills.survivor 2) (!= $data.market.foundFence true)): set data.market.foundFence true jump market_fence "[Talk to the street kids]" if (!= $data.market.talkedToKids true): set data.market.talkedToKids true run spend_hours 1 jump market_kids "[Leave] [[BACK TO MAP]]": jump game_map market_browse: clear_dialog "You wander through the market, looking at what's available." clear_dialog choice: "What catches your eye?" "[Food stall] - Hot meal (5 credits)" if (>= $data.inventory.credits 5): subtract data.inventory.credits 5 "You buy a bowl of stew and some bread. It's not fancy, but it fills your stomach." clear_dialog if (roll market_food survivor 30): talk survivor internal "Good choice. Keep your strength up." "[Tech dealer] - Various electronics": jump market_tech "[Clothes vendor] - Practical clothing": jump market_clothes "[Herbalist] - Traditional medicines": jump market_herbalist "[Back]": jump market_main market_tech: clear_dialog "A stall piled high with scavenged electronics. Old phones, broken screens, tangled cables." clear_dialog "The dealer eyes you with suspicion." clear_dialog choice: "What do you want to buy?" "[Basic toolkit] - 15 credits" if (&& (!= (has_item? toolkit) true) (>= $data.inventory.credits 15)): subtract data.inventory.credits 15 add_item toolkit 1 "A basic set of tools. Useful for repairs." add_level hacker 1 "[Signal booster] - 25 credits" if (&& (!= (has_item? signal_booster) true) (>= $data.inventory.credits 25)): subtract data.inventory.credits 25 add_item signal_booster 1 "Boosts your neural deck's range. Helpful for hacking at a distance." "[Used credchip] - 10 credits" if (>= $data.inventory.credits 10): subtract data.inventory.credits 10 "You buy a used credchip. You're better off going to Tango. He's the only one in Dunoon who really understands that tech." talk tech_dealer talk "Though... there was someone else. A doctor. Used to come through here buying medical supplies. Haven't seen her in weeks." talk hacker internal "A doctor. Someone who might know about implants. Worth investigating." set data.quests.knowAboutDoctor true "[Back]": jump market_browse market_clothes: clear_dialog "Battered clothing hangs from lines. Everything is second-hand, third-hand, tenth-hand." clear_dialog choice: "What do you want to buy?" "[Armored jacket] - 30 credits" if (&& (!= (has_item? armored_jacket) true) (>= $data.inventory.credits 30)): subtract data.inventory.credits 30 add_item armored_jacket 1 "A jacket with hidden reinforcement. Won't stop a bullet, but might help in a fight." add_level survivor 1 "[Dark clothes] - 10 credits" if (&& (!= (has_item? dark_clothes) true) (>= $data.inventory.credits 10)): subtract data.inventory.credits 10 add_item dark_clothes 1 "Dark, nondescript clothing. Good for blending in." "[Work boots] - 15 credits" if (&& (!= (has_item? work_boots) true) (>= $data.inventory.credits 15)): subtract data.inventory.credits 15 add_item work_boots 1 "Sturdy boots. Your feet will thank you." "[Back]": jump market_browse market_herbalist: clear_dialog "An old woman sits behind a table covered in jars, pouches, and dried plants." clear_dialog talk herbalist talk "You look sick. Inside. Something wrong with your head, yes?" clear_dialog choice: "What do you say?" "Can you help me?": talk herbalist talk "I can give you something for the pain. Something to help you sleep. Something to strengthen your spirit." talk herbalist talk "But what's wrong with you—that's not something herbs can fix. You need a different kind of healing." talk ancestor internal "She speaks true. The body can be healed. The mind... that requires different medicine." "What do you recommend?": jump market_herbalist_buy "I'm fine.": talk herbalist talk "Mm. We all say that. Doesn't make it true." jump market_browse market_herbalist_buy: choice: "What do you want to buy?" "[Pain medicine] - 5 credits" if (>= $data.inventory.credits 5): subtract data.inventory.credits 5 add_item pain_meds 1 "A pouch of herbs that help with headaches." "[Sleep aid] - 5 credits" if (>= $data.inventory.credits 5): subtract data.inventory.credits 5 add_item sleep_aid 1 "A tea that promotes restful sleep." "[Spirit tonic] - 15 credits" if (>= $data.inventory.credits 15): subtract data.inventory.credits 15 add_item spirit_tonic 1 "A bitter liquid that "clears the mind and strengthens the soul."" add_level ancestor 1 "[Back]": jump market_herbalist market_info: clear_dialog "You ask around about neural implants, about the wine farms, about anything that might help you understand what happened." clear_dialog if (roll market_rumors survivor 40): "A vendor leans in close." clear_dialog talk vendor talk "You want to know about the farms? Turning them into... something else." talk survivor internal "Experiments. That name... it's in the encrypted partition. We need to remember why." set data.quests.knowAboutAries true jump market_main market_fence: clear_dialog "You find a man selling things that probably don't belong to him." clear_dialog talk fence talk "You look like someone who appreciates... alternative commerce." clear_dialog choice: "What are you looking for?" "[Sell items]": if (has_item? shiv): "Sell shiv for 10 credits?" choice: "Yes": remove_item shiv 1 add data.inventory.credits 10 "No": jump market_fence else: "You have nothing to sell." "[Buy illegal goods]": jump market_fence_buy "[Ask about the underground]": talk fence talk "The underground? You mean the resistance? The Netrunners?" talk fence talk "I don't know nothing about that. And if I did, I wouldn't tell a stranger." talk survivor internal "He knows something. But he's not going to talk without a reason." "[Back]": jump market_main market_fence_buy: choice: "What do you want?" "[Fake ID] - 40 credits" if (&& (!= (has_item? fake_id) true) (>= $data.inventory.credits 40)): subtract data.inventory.credits 40 add_item fake_id 1 "A decent fake. Might get you past basic security." "[Lockpicks] - 20 credits" if (&& (!= (has_item? lockpicks) true) (>= $data.inventory.credits 20)): subtract data.inventory.credits 20 add_item lockpicks 1 "A set of lockpicks. Useful for physical security." "[Stolen access codes] - 30 credits" if (&& (!= (has_item? access_codes) true) (>= $data.inventory.credits 30)): subtract data.inventory.credits 30 add_item access_codes 1 "Codes to a corporate building downtown. Might be useful, might be expired." "[Back]": jump market_fence market_kids: clear_dialog "A group of street kids watches you. The oldest can't be more than twelve." clear_dialog choice: "How do you approach them?" "[Give them food]" if (>= $data.inventory.credits 5): subtract data.inventory.credits 5 "You buy some food and hand it out. They look at you with something like respect." clear_dialog talk street_kid talk "You're not like the others. You're from here." talk street_kid talk "We seen people looking for you. Bad people. Corporate types." talk survivor internal "They're tracking us. We need to be more careful." set data.quests.corpsTracking true "[Ask them questions]": "They're suspicious at first, but you speak to them in the right way. Street to street." clear_dialog talk street_kid talk "You want to know about the farms? We sneak up there sometimes. Steal fruit." talk street_kid talk "But lately there's more guards. And we seen them taking people in. Never seen them come out." talk survivor internal "People going in but not coming out. That's a death camp. Or worse." "[Offer them credits for information]" if (>= $data.inventory.credits 10): subtract data.inventory.credits 10 "Credits change hands. Information follows." clear_dialog talk street_kid talk "There's a man. Silas. He lives in the abandoned lot. Helps people like us." talk street_kid talk "He knew you. Before. He might know what happened." set data.quests.silasKnows true set data.quests.knowAboutSilas true jump market_main // ==================== NET CAFE ==================== location_net_cafe: run transition net_cafe set data.game_map.inMap false set data.game_map.currentLocation "net_cafe" clear_dialog "The Net Cafe. A cramped room full of old terminals and desperate people." clear_dialog "The smell of sweat and burnt circuits. The glow of screens." clear_dialog jump net_cafe_main net_cafe_main: clear_dialog run hours_display clear_dialog choice: "What do you do?" "[Use a terminal] - Cost: 1 hour" if (>= $data.time.hoursRemaining 3): run spend_hours 1 jump net_cafe_terminal "[Talk to the owner]" if (!= $data.netCafe.talkedToOwner true): set data.netCafe.talkedToOwner true jump net_cafe_owner "[Look for other hackers]" if (>= $data.skills.hacker 2): jump net_cafe_hackers "[Access the deep Net]" if (&& (has_item? neural_deck) (>= $data.skills.hacker 3)): run spend_hours 3 jump net_cafe_deep "[Leave] [[BACK TO MAP]]": jump game_map net_cafe_terminal: clear_dialog "You sit at a terminal and start searching." clear_dialog set data.netCafe.searchResult (random 1 4) if (== $data.netCafe.searchResult 1): "You find news reports about increased corporate activity in the wine region." clear_dialog talk hacker internal "Something's happening out there. Something big." elseif (== $data.netCafe.searchResult 2): "You find a forum for neural implant users. A thread about memory recovery catches your eye." clear_dialog "\"The key is not to force it. Let the memories come naturally. Strong emotions can trigger recall.\"" talk ancestor internal "Wise. The harder we grasp, the more slips through our fingers." elseif (== $data.netCafe.searchResult 3): "You find a help wanted ad: "Test subjects needed for medical research. Good pay. No questions asked."" clear_dialog talk survivor internal "That's how they get you. How they got us, maybe." else: "You find nothing useful. Just noise and distraction." jump net_cafe_main net_cafe_owner: clear_dialog "The owner is a middle-aged woman with tired eyes and calloused fingers." clear_dialog talk net_cafe_owner talk "You're the one Mama Nomi found. The amnesiac." clear_dialog talk net_cafe_owner talk "I've seen your type before. Running from something. Running toward something." clear_dialog talk net_cafe_owner talk "The Net remembers everything. If you want to know who you are, start there." clear_dialog choice: "What do you ask?" "How do I search for my past?": talk net_cafe_owner talk "Start with what you know. Names. Places. Dates. Even fragments can lead somewhere." talk net_cafe_owner talk "And be careful. The Net has eyes everywhere." "Do you know anything about me?": talk net_cafe_owner talk "I know you came in here before. Maybe a month ago. Used the terminals for hours." talk net_cafe_owner talk "You were searching for something. I don't know what. But you looked scared when you left." set data.netCafe.wasHereBefore true "What's the deep Net?": talk net_cafe_owner talk "The deep Net is where the real information lives. And the real danger." talk net_cafe_owner talk "Corporate secrets. Government black sites. Things they don't want us to know." talk net_cafe_owner talk "If you want to go there, you need better equipment than these terminals." jump net_cafe_main net_cafe_hackers: clear_dialog "You spot them in the corner—heads together, speaking in low voices. The body language of people who know things." clear_dialog if (roll hacker_recognize hacker 40): "One of them looks up. His eyes widen." clear_dialog talk hacker_npc talk "Kundai? Is that you? We thought you were dead." clear_dialog "They know you." clear_dialog jump net_cafe_collective_meeting else: "They look at you, assess you, decide you're not a threat. Or not worth their time." clear_dialog "You'll need to prove yourself before they'll talk." jump net_cafe_main net_cafe_collective_meeting: clear_dialog "The hackers invite you to sit. They explain." clear_dialog talk hacker_npc talk "You were one of us. The Netrunner Collective. We fight the corps, expose their secrets." talk hacker_npc talk "You were working on something big. Something about the wine farms. Then you disappeared." clear_dialog talk hacker_npc talk "We found your safehouse. The shack. But you were gone." clear_dialog "A collective memory surfaces. These are your people. Your comrades." clear_dialog set data.player.memoriesRecovered (+ $data.player.memoriesRecovered 1) set data.quests.metCollective true run modify_relationship "netrunnerCollective" 3 choice: "What do you ask?" "What was I working on?": talk hacker_npc talk "Project Lazarus. A black-site experiment program. The corps are using people as test subjects." talk hacker_npc talk "You were trying to get evidence. Proof. Something to blow the whole thing open." set data.quests.knowAboutLazarus true "Who did this to me?": talk hacker_npc talk "We don't know for sure. But there are rumors. Aries Corp security. Or maybe someone on the inside." talk hacker_npc talk "You were paranoid at the end. Said you couldn't trust anyone." "Can you help me?": talk hacker_npc talk "We can try. But you're not the same person. The implant damage... it's changed you." talk hacker_npc talk "We'll share information. Help you remember. But you'll have to do the heavy lifting yourself." add_level hacker 1 jump net_cafe_main net_cafe_deep: clear_dialog "You jack into the deep Net. The world dissolves into light and code." clear_dialog "Here, you're not a body in a shack. You're pure information. Pure potential." clear_dialog if (roll deep_net_explore hacker 50): "You navigate the data streams with instinctive grace. Your old self knew this place well." clear_dialog // Random discovery set data.deepNet.finding (random 1 3) if (== $data.deepNet.finding 1): "You find a hidden file server. Inside: partial records of Project Lazarus." clear_dialog "Subject names. Experiment parameters. And a location: the old winery on the hill." set data.quests.foundWineryLocation true set data.player.memoriesRecovered (+ $data.player.memoriesRecovered 1) elseif (== $data.deepNet.finding 2): "You find a message, addressed to you, left in a dead drop." clear_dialog "\"Kundai, if you're reading this, I'm sorry. They got to me. The evidence is hidden at Mama Nomi's. In the back room. Trust no one. - S"" set data.quests.foundMessage true else: "You find traces of your own digital footprint. Posts, messages, searches." clear_dialog "You were searching for someone. A family member. Your mother, maybe." talk ancestor internal "We were looking for our roots. Even before we lost our memory." else: "The deep Net fights back. ICE attacks your consciousness. You barely escape." clear_dialog run spend_hours 2 talk survivor internal "Too risky. We need to be more careful." jump net_cafe_main // ==================== CLINIC ==================== location_clinic: run transition clinic set data.game_map.inMap false set data.game_map.currentLocation "clinic" clear_dialog "The Dunoon Community Clinic. Underfunded. Overcrowded. Essential." clear_dialog "The smell of antiseptic and despair. People waiting on benches, hoping for help that might not come." clear_dialog jump clinic_main clinic_main: clear_dialog run hours_display clear_dialog choice: "What do you do?" "[See a doctor] - Cost: 3 hours" if (>= $data.time.hoursRemaining 5): run spend_hours 3 jump clinic_doctor "[Talk to patients]" if (!= $data.clinic.talkedToPatients true): set data.clinic.talkedToPatients true run spend_hours 1 jump clinic_patients "[Look for medical records]" if (>= $data.skills.hacker 2): jump clinic_records "[Leave] [[BACK TO MAP]]": jump game_map clinic_doctor: clear_dialog "A tired doctor sees you. But I can give you something for the symptoms. Slow the degradation." clear_dialog choice: "What do you say?" "Please. I need more time.": talk doctor talk "I can give you stimulants. Keep you going. But it's borrowing from tomorrow." add_item medical_stims 1 add data.time.hoursRemaining 5 "You feel a brief surge of clarity. The countdown has slowed, for now." "Do you know what caused this?": talk doctor talk "I've seen this before. Neural burnout. Usually from... forced extraction." talk doctor talk "Someone tried to pull information from your implant. Roughly. Without proper protocols." talk hacker internal "Interrogation. They were trying to get something from us." "Have you seen others like me?": talk doctor talk "...Yes. A few. They didn't last long. The damage was too severe." talk doctor talk "You're the first one who's been able to walk in here." talk survivor internal "We're stronger than the others. Or luckier." jump clinic_main clinic_patients: clear_dialog "You talk to the people waiting. They have stories." clear_dialog "A man with a cybernetic arm that's malfunctioning:" talk patient talk "The corps promise us augmentations. Better lives. Then they abandon us when things go wrong." "A woman with a persistent cough:" talk patient talk "The dust from the mines. Gets in your lungs. No one cares about us poor folk." "A young man with vacant eyes:" talk patient talk "He was normal a month ago. Then he took a job at the farms. Came back like this." talk survivor internal "Another victim. Whatever they're doing out there, it's destroying people." jump clinic_main clinic_records: clear_dialog "You sneak toward the back, looking for the records room." clear_dialog if (roll clinic_sneak survivor 40): "You find a terminal. Quick hacking while no one's looking." clear_dialog if (roll clinic_hack hacker 50): "Medical records flash past. You find something: your name. Admitted three weeks ago. Neural trauma. Discharged AMA." clear_dialog "Signed by: Dr. A. Okonkwo. And a note: "Patient claims memory tampering. Recommend psych evaluation."" set data.clinic.foundRecord true set data.quests.knowAboutOkonkwo true talk hacker internal "Dr. Okonkwo. Either they didn't believe us, or they were paid not to." else: "The terminal is locked down. You can't get in without alerting someone." else: "A nurse spots you." talk nurse talk "Can I help you with something?" "You back off, muttering an excuse." jump clinic_main // ==================== ABANDONED LOT ==================== location_abandoned_lot: run transition abandoned_lot set data.game_map.inMap false set data.game_map.currentLocation "abandoned_lot" clear_dialog "An abandoned lot on the edge of Dunoon. Shacks in progress. Trash. Graffiti." clear_dialog "And a man sitting on a crate, watching you." clear_dialog jump lot_main lot_main: clear_dialog if (!= $data.lot.metSilas true): jump lot_meet_silas run hours_display clear_dialog choice: "What do you do?" "[Talk to Silas]": jump lot_talk_silas "[Ask about the Collective]" if $data.quests.metCollective: jump lot_collective_info "[Ask about Project Lazarus]" if $data.quests.knowAboutLazarus: jump lot_lazarus_info "[Rest here] - Cost: 1 hour" if (>= $data.time.hoursRemaining 3): run spend_hours 1 "You sit in silence. Silas respects your need for quiet." jump lot_main "[Leave] [[BACK TO MAP]]": jump game_map lot_meet_silas: set data.lot.metSilas true clear_dialog talk silas talk "Kundai. You're alive." clear_dialog "He doesn't sound happy. Or sad. Just... resigned." clear_dialog talk silas talk "I heard what happened. The implant. The memory loss." clear_dialog talk silas talk "You probably don't remember me. But I remember you. We were friends once. Comrades." clear_dialog choice: "How do you respond?" "Tell me who I was.": jump silas_backstory "What happened to me?": jump silas_explanation "I don't trust you.": talk silas talk "Good. Trust no one. That's what you taught me." talk silas talk "But if you want answers, I'm one of the few who has them." run modify_relationship "silas" 1 jump lot_main silas_backstory: clear_dialog talk silas talk "You came to Dunoon two years ago. Running from something—you never said what." talk silas talk "You had skills. Hacking. Tech. You used them to help people. Exposed a landlord who was poisoning his tenants." talk silas talk "That's when the Collective noticed you. They recruited you. You became one of their best." clear_dialog talk silas talk "Then you found out about Project Lazarus. You became obsessed. Said you were going to bring the whole thing down." talk silas talk "And then you disappeared." clear_dialog set data.player.memoriesRecovered (+ $data.player.memoriesRecovered 1) jump lot_main silas_explanation: clear_dialog talk silas talk "I don't know everything. But I know you were captured. Held somewhere." talk silas talk "When you got back, you were different. Couldn't remember anything. Kept asking who you were." talk silas talk "Mama Nomi found you wandering the streets. Brought you to your old shack. Said you'd wake up or you wouldn't." clear_dialog talk silas talk "The fact that you're standing here... you're stronger than most." clear_dialog jump lot_main lot_talk_silas: clear_dialog talk silas talk "What do you need?" clear_dialog choice: "What do you ask?" "Tell me about the Collective.": talk silas talk "We're fighters. Hackers. Activists. We believe the corps are destroying our world." talk silas talk "We fight back the only way we can—with information. With the truth." talk silas talk "You believed in that. Once." "Do you know who did this to me?": talk silas talk "I have my suspicions. Aries Corp. Their security division." talk silas talk "They're the ones running Project Lazarus. You got too close. They decided to make an example." set data.quests.knowAboutAries true "Can you help me remember?": talk silas talk "I can tell you what I know. But memory... that's something you have to find yourself." talk silas talk "Go to the places that meant something to you. Talk to the people who knew you." talk silas talk "The implant is dying. But before it goes, it might give up its secrets." "I should go.": jump lot_main jump lot_talk_silas lot_collective_info: clear_dialog talk silas talk "You want to know about the Collective? You helped build it." talk silas talk "We operate in cells. Small groups, each with a piece of the puzzle. No one knows everything." talk silas talk "Your cell was focused on Aries Corp. You were getting close to something big." clear_dialog talk silas talk "There are others. Tango. Mama Nomi. Even me. We all play our part." clear_dialog jump lot_main lot_lazarus_info: clear_dialog talk silas talk "Project Lazarus. The worst thing the corps have ever done." talk silas talk "They're experimenting on people. Neural implants. Memory manipulation. Personality reconstruction." talk silas talk "They're trying to create the perfect workers. The perfect soldiers. People who don't know they're being controlled." clear_dialog talk silas talk "You found evidence. Proof. But they got to you before you could release it." talk silas talk "The evidence is still out there. Hidden. You were always paranoid. Always had backup plans." clear_dialog set data.quests.knowLazarusDetails true jump lot_main // ==================== WINE FARM ==================== location_wine_farm: run transition wine_farm_exterior set data.game_map.inMap false set data.game_map.currentLocation "wine_farm" clear_dialog "The wine farm sprawls before you—endless rows of vines, a main building in the distance, and the sense of something very wrong beneath the beauty." clear_dialog "Security cameras. This is no ordinary farm." clear_dialog jump wine_farm_main wine_farm_main: clear_dialog run hours_display clear_dialog // Danger check if (roll wine_farm_danger survivor 30): talk survivor internal "We shouldn't be here. Too exposed." choice: "How do you approach?" "[Sneak in]" if (>= $data.skills.survivor 2): run spend_hours 3 jump wine_farm_sneak "[Hack the security]" if (&& (has_item? neural_deck) (>= $data.skills.hacker 3)): run spend_hours 4 jump wine_farm_hack "[Front door] - Pretend to be a worker": run spend_hours 2 jump wine_farm_front "[Leave] [[BACK TO MAP]]": jump game_map wine_farm_sneak: clear_dialog "You move through the vines, keeping low, using the rows as cover." clear_dialog if (roll sneak_success survivor 50): "You reach the main building. And on tables, unconscious figures with neural implants visible at the base of their skulls." clear_dialog talk survivor internal "Project Lazarus. This is where they do it." set data.quests.foundLab true set data.player.memoriesRecovered (+ $data.player.memoriesRecovered 1) else: "A patrol spots you. You have to run." clear_dialog run spend_hours 2 "You escape, but barely. They've seen your face now." set data.quests.wineFarmAlerted true jump wine_farm_main wine_farm_hack: clear_dialog "You find a secluded spot and jack into their local network." clear_dialog if (roll hack_security hacker 60): "The ICE is tough, but you're tougher. Who are you?" clear_dialog "You have to think fast." clear_dialog choice: "What do you say?" "I'm new. Started today.": if (roll bluff_new survivor 30): "The guard shrugs. "Go on."" jump wine_farm_explore else: "The guard reaches for his radio. You run." run spend_hours 2 set data.quests.wineFarmAlerted true "Wrong farm. My mistake.": "You back away slowly. The guard watches you go." "[Run]": "You bolt. "[The workers]": "You talk to some of the workers. They're wary, but one older woman opens up." clear_dialog talk worker talk "You want to know what happens here? Bad things.
